Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: PURPOSE: Regression test for the KMP creation chain. Covers: KMP__CreateFromUlaznaFaktura (idempotent), KMP__GenerateStavke (guard), KMP__Post (guard), KMP__RefreshTotals.

Step.name: Perform Script

Message.Calculation: "Test 1 failed — cannot continue without a kalkulacijaID.¶¶" & JSONFormatElements ( $$log )

Step.name: # (comment)
Step.Text: ── Test 2: Duplicate create (idempotent — must return same ID, not fail) ─

Step.name: Perform Script
